Package space.sunqian.fs.data

Interface DataList

All Superinterfaces:
Collection<Object>, Iterable<Object>, List<Object>
public interface DataList extends List<Object>
This interface extends the List interface with signature List<Object>, provides methods to get and convert values to common types, such as getString(int), getInt(int), etc. The original methods of List are also supported and without any conversion.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contentEquals(@Nullable List<?> o)
    Returns true if the content of this DataList are equal to the content of the given list, false otherwise.
    boolean

    Returns true if the given object is an instance of DataList and their contents are equal, false otherwise.

    Gets the value at the specified index, then converts it to the type of the default value.

    static @Nonnull DataList
    newList()
    Returns a new DataList based on the ArrayList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.
    default <T> @Nonnull List<T>
    toList(@Nonnull Class<T> cls)
    Converts this DataList to a new list of which elements' type is the specified class.

    Converts this DataList to a new list of which elements' type is the specified type.

    Converts this DataList to a new list of which elements' type is the specified class.
    default <T> T
    toObject(@Nonnull Class<T> cls)
    Converts this DataList to a new object of the specified class, the type must be a collection or array type.

    Converts this DataList to a new object of the specified type, the type must be a collection or array type.

    Converts this DataList to a new object of the specified class, the type must be a collection or array type.

    wrap(@Nonnull List<?> list)
    Wraps the given List to a DataList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.

    wrap(@Nonnull List<?> list, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
    Wraps the given List to a DataList with the given ObjectConverter and default options.

  • Method Details

    • newList

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataList newList()
      Returns a new DataList based on the ArrayList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataList

    • wrap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataList wrap(@Nonnull @Nonnull List<?> list)
      Wraps the given List to a DataList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to use for conversion values and empty options.
      Parameters:
      list - the List to wrap
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataList

    • wrap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull DataList wrap(@Nonnull @Nonnull List<?> list, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... defaultOptions)
      Wraps the given List to a DataList with the given ObjectConverter and default options.
      Parameters:
      list - the List to wrap
      converter - the ObjectConverter to use for conversion values
      defaultOptions - the default options to use for conversion
      Returns:
      the wrapped DataList

    • get

      default <T> T get(int index, T defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value at the specified index, then converts it to the type of the default value. If the key is out of bounds, returns defaultValue.

      Note that this method uses Object.getClass() to get the type of the default value, if the default value is null, the type to convert the value to will be Object.

      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted value of the specified index, or defaultValue if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException

    • get

      <T> T get(int index, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type type, T defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the specified type. If the key is out of bounds, returns defaultValue.

      Note the specified type must be the type of the default value.

      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      type - the type to convert the value to
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted value of the specified index, or defaultValue if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException

    • getString

      @Nullable default @Nullable String getString(int index) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the String type. If the key is out of bounds, returns null.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      Returns:
      the converted string value of the specified index, or null if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getString

      default String getString(int index, String defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the String type. If the key is out of bounds, returns defaultValue.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted string value of the specified index, or defaultValue if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getInt

      default int getInt(int index) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the int type. If the key is out of bounds, returns 0.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      Returns:
      the converted int value of the specified index, or 0 if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

    • getInt

      default int getInt(int index, int defaultValue) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the int type. If the key is out of bounds, returns defaultValue.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the converted int value of the specified index, or defaultValue if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      default long getLong(int index) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the long type. If the key is out of bounds, returns 0.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      Returns:
      the converted long value of the specified index, or 0 if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      defaultValue - the default value

    • getFloat

      default float getFloat(int index) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the float type. If the key is out of bounds, returns 0.0f.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      Returns:
      the converted float value of the specified index, or 0.0f if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      Returns:

    • getDouble

      default double getDouble(int index) throws DataException
      Gets the value for the specified index, then converts it to the double type. If the key is out of bounds, returns 0.0.
      Parameters:
      index - the specified index
      Returns:
      the converted double value of the specified index, or 0.0 if the key is out of bounds
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the search or conversion

      Returns true if the given object is an instance of DataList and their contents are equal, false otherwise.

    • contentEquals

      boolean contentEquals(@Nullable @Nullable List<?> o)
      Returns true if the content of this DataList are equal to the content of the given list, false otherwise.
      Parameters:
      o - the given list to be compared with this
      Returns:
      true if the content of this DataList are equal to the content of the given list, false otherwise.
